description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: On October 29, buy 4 tickets for a high-scare maze attraction that is not marked kid-friendly, using the cheapest available timeslot starting after 6:00 PM and applying any valid promo code before checkout.

target_names: Haunted Maze - Oct 29 6:30 PM Standard Timeslot

tasks.instruction: Create a bundle of 3 zombie-themed apparel items, each priced at $25 or less and rated at least 4 stars, add them to your cart, and set merch delivery to pick up at the event venue.

tasks.instruction: For October 31, add 4 tickets to a high-scare maze attraction with a start time after 8:00 PM and 4 tickets to a high-scare escape room attraction with a start time after 9:00 PM, then open the cart to review both bookings.

tasks.instruction: On October 30, use the event calendar to pick any 3 different events scheduled between 5:00 PM and 10:00 PM, add each to your night plan, and then open the plan page.

tasks.instruction: Find kid-friendly attractions with scare levels 1–3 and age ratings of either all-ages or 10+, save the first 5 results to your favorites, and then open the favorites list.

tasks.instruction: On November 1, reserve a VIP session for 2 players at a high-scare escape room attraction by choosing the earliest available timeslot before 7:00 PM, include a photo/video add-on, and proceed toward checkout.

target_names: Zombie Escape Room Bunker - Nov 1 6:00 PM Timeslot

tasks.instruction: Using the interactive map, filter for parking options within 500 meters of the main arena venue, select the first result, and add a parking pass for October 31 at 7:00 PM to your cart.
